meaning: n.刺激,兴奋剂adj.刺激的,兴奋的
examples: For those that operate incitant drugs, in addition to provide sound drug sales records, they must also provide pharmic consultation service for their drugs.
Incitant has a wide range and illicit drugs is part of doping. There are 100 medicines divided into five categories which are prohibited to use as doping by IOC.
